    Field
    Description
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.BLACK
    A constant representing the color black (RGB 0,0,0).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.BLUE
    A constant representing the color blue (RGB 0,0,255).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.BROWN
    A constant representing the color brown (RGB 139,69,19).

    A constant representing the color cyan (RGB 0,255,255).

    static final PotColor

    static final PotColor
    PotColor.DARK_RED
    A constant representing the color dark red (RGB 139,0,0).
    static final PotColor

    A constant representing the color gray (RGB 128,128,128).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.GREEN
    A constant representing the color green (RGB 0,128,0).

    A constant representing the color light blue (RGB 173,216,230).

    PotColor.LIGHT_GRAY

    static final PotColor
    PotColor.LIGHT_GREEN

    static final PotColor
    PotColor.LIGHT_YELLOW

    static final PotColor

    static final PotColor

    A constant representing the color pink (RGB 255,192,203).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.PURPLE
    A constant representing the color purple (RGB 128,0,128).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.RED
    A constant representing the color red (RGB 255,0,0).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.TRANSPARENT
    A constant representing a fully transparent color (RGBA 0,0,0,0).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.WHITE
    A constant representing the color white (RGB 255,255,255).
    static final PotColor
    PotColor.YELLOW
    A constant representing the color yellow (RGB 255,255,0).

    Method
    Description

    Returns the complementary color.
    PotColor

    Creates a darker version of this color.

    Returns the background color for a pattern fill.

    Returns the color of this border.
    PotColor
    PotEffect.Glow.getColor()
    Returns the current color of the glow effect.
    PotColor
    PotFill.getColor()
    Returns the color associated with this fill.
    PotColor
    PotFont.getColor()
    Returns the text color.
    PotColor
    PotGradient.GradientStop.getColor()
    Returns the color of this stop.
    PotColor
    PotShadow.getColor()
    Returns the color of this shadow.
    PotColor
    PotShape.getFillColor()
    Returns the current solid fill color of this shape.
    PotColor
    PotTableCell.getFillColor()
    Returns the current background fill color of the cell as a PotColor.
    PotColor
    PotConnector.getLineColor()
    Returns the current line color as a PotColor.
    PotColor
    PotShape.getLineColor()
    Returns the current border color of this shape.

    Retrieves a theme color by its index.

    Creates a PotColor from a hexadecimal color string.

    Creates a PotColor from HSL (Hue, Saturation, Lightness) values.

    Creates a lighter version of this color.
    PotColor

    Linearly interpolates between this color and another color.

    Creates an opaque PotColor from red, green, and blue components.
    static PotColor

    Creates a PotColor from red, green, blue, and alpha components.
    PotColor

    Converts this color to grayscale using a standard luminance formula.
    PotColor

    Creates a new color with a different alpha component.
    PotColor

    Creates a new color with a different opacity.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotGradient
    PotGradient.addStop(double position, PotColor color)
    Adds a color stop with full opacity to this gradient, returning a new gradient.
    PotGradient
    PotGradient.addStop(double position, PotColor color, double opacity)
    Returns a new gradient with the specified stop added at the given position, color, and opacity.
    PotTable
    PotTable.alternateColumnColors(PotColor color1, PotColor color2)
    Applies alternating background colors to columns.
    PotTable
    PotTable.alternateRowColors(PotColor color1, PotColor color2)
    Applies alternating background colors to rows.
    PotImage
    PotImage.borderColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the border color of the image.
    PotShape
    PotShape.borderColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the border color of this shape.
    PotTextBox
    PotTextBox.borderColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the border color of the text box shape.
    PotTextBox
    PotTextBox.bulletColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the bullet color for all paragraphs within the text box.
    PotBorder
    PotBorder.color(PotColor color)
    Creates a new border with the specified color.
    PotEffect.Glow
    PotEffect.Glow.color(PotColor color)
    Sets the color of the glow effect.
    PotFont
    PotFont.color(PotColor color)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified text color, preserving all other properties.
    PotShadow
    PotShadow.color(PotColor color)
    Returns a new shadow with the specified color, leaving all other properties unchanged.

    Creates a dash-dot border with the specified width and color.

    PotBorder.dashed(double width, PotColor color)
    Creates a dashed border with the specified width and color.

    Creates a diagonal (45-degree) two-color linear gradient.

    Creates a dotted border with the specified width and color.

    Sets a solid color fill for this shape.

    PotTable.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color for all cells in the table.

    PotTable.PotTableColumn.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color for all cells in this column.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color for all cells in this row.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color of the cell using a PotColor.

    PotTextBox.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets a solid fill color for the text box shape.
    PotTable
    PotTable.fillColumn(int col, PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color for all cells in a specific column.
    PotTable
    PotTable.fillRange(int startRow, int startCol, int endRow, int endCol, PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color for a rectangular range of cells.
    PotTable
    PotTable.fillRow(int row, PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color for all cells in a specific row.
    PotShape
    PotShape.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for all text runs within this shape.
    PotTable
    PotTable.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for text in all cells.
    PotTable.PotTableColumn
    PotTable.PotTableColumn.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for text in all cells in this column.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for text in all cells in this row.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for all text runs within the cell using a PotColor.
    PotTextBox
    PotTextBox.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for all text runs within the text box using a PotColor.

    Sets the background fill color for this master.

    PotSlide.setBackground(PotColor color)
    Sets a solid color background for the slide.

    Creates a simple two-color linear gradient with the specified angle and colors.

    Creates a solid border with the specified width and color.

    PotFill.solid(PotColor color)
    Creates a solid fill with the specified color and full opacity.

    Creates a solid fill with the specified color and opacity.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    GradientStop(double position, PotColor color)
    Constructs a fully opaque gradient stop.
     
    GradientStop(double position, PotColor color, double opacity)
    Constructs a gradient stop with the specified position, color, and opacity.
